query: SELECT s.name as store_name, p.store_id, COUNT(*) as duplicate_groups, SUM(p.cnt - 1) as products_to_delete FROM (SELECT store_id, name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products GROUP BY store_id, name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) p JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name, p.store_id ORDER BY s.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.name as store_name, p.store_id, COUNT(*) as duplicate_groups, SUM(p.cnt - 1) as products_to_delete FROM (SELECT store_id, name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products GROUP BY store_id, name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) p JOIN stores s ON p.store_id = s.id GROUP BY s.name, p.store_id ORDER BY s.name;
